title: BIMI
helpOutput:
Usage: bimi [<options>] <domain>

  Look up BIMI records for a domain.

Options:
  --json                 Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>    DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>    Query timeout in seconds
  -S, --selector=<text>  BIMI selector (default: 'default')
  -h, --help             Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to look up BIMI records for
output: BIMI lookup failed for default._bimi.google.com: NXDOMAIN
